name: Bonnie Adult Dog Food – Lamb and Rice 15kg
shortDescription: Crafted with care, Bonnie Lamb & Rice Adult Dog Food provides balanced nourishment through premium lamb protein and easily digestible rice. Rich in essential vitamins and minerals, it helps maintain muscle strength, supports joint health, and promotes long-term well-being for adult dogs of all breeds.
description: Bonnie Lamb & Rice Adult Dog food , full-balanced, lamb protein-containing all-natural dog food carefully formulated by a dog nutritionist to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds. Lamb meal has been used as animal protein source. The balance of omega 3 & 6 is provided by using flaxseed . Yucca plant provides ammonia and Oduor control, increase absorption of nutrients, strengthens the immune system and optimizes animal growth and performance. A good intestinal health and performance is provided by CitriStim which is a source of pathogen-binding mannooligosaccharide , immune provide beta-glucans and immune-supportive yeast. Healthy skin and shiny coat are supported by using brewer’s yeast . Muscles, organs and nerve cells are supported, and the immune system strengthened by using whey powder . Rich vitamin contents. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Protein…………………….. 18% Fat ………………………..7% Crude Ash………………8% Crude Cellulose (Fiber) ………4% INGREDIENTS: Lamb Proteins (dehydrated), Animal proteins (dehydrated), Wheat, Corn, Animal Fat, Corn Gluten, Rice, Dried Beet Pulp, Liver Flavour, Salt, Flaxseed, Dried Brewer’s Yeast, Yucca Schidigera, Mannan-Oligosaccharides, Beta Glucan. MINERALS: Calcium, Phosphorus, Sodium, Ionide, Zinc, Copper, Potassium Chloride, Iron, Selenium. VITAMINS: Vit. A, Vit. D, Vit. E, Vit. C, Vit. B1 – B2 – B3 (niacin) – B6 – B12 – B7 (biotin) – B9 (folic acid), Vit. K, Choline, Calcium Pantotetan.
